message:
fix(tui): ensure first tick always triggers data refresh on all screens

Add DataGeneration::stale() constructor that returns a sentinel with all
fields set to u64::MAX, guaranteed to differ from any real generation
snapshot (which starts at zero). Replace DataGeneration::default() with
stale() in the initial state of all 15 TUI screens so the first tick
always evaluates as dirty and triggers data ingestion. Previously,
default() produced all-zeros which matched the initial generation
counters, causing screens to skip their first data load and appear
blank until the next database write.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -205,7 +205,7 @@ impl AttachmentExplorerScreen {
             last_error: None,
             data_dirty: true,
             last_reload_tick: 0,
-            last_data_gen: super::DataGeneration::default(),
+            last_data_gen: super::DataGeneration::stale(),
             focused_synthetic: None,
             prev_attachment_counts: (0, 0, 0, 0),
         }

@@ -1088,7 +1088,7 @@ impl MessageBrowserScreen {
             last_search_area: Cell::new(Rect::new(0, 0, 0, 0)),
             last_results_area: Cell::new(Rect::new(0, 0, 0, 0)),
             last_detail_area: Cell::new(Rect::new(0, 0, 0, 0)),
-            last_data_gen: super::DataGeneration::default(),
+            last_data_gen: super::DataGeneration::stale(),
             quick_reply_form: None,
             compose_form: None,
             detail_cache: RefCell::new(None),
